assumptions: Collections for courses, lessons, and exercises already exist in Payload
Published/unpublished status field already exists on these collections
Enrollment system exists to track user course registrations
Access control functions (isPublished, isEnrolled, etc.) may already exist
review_questions: What is the current implementation causing published content to not display?
Is there an existing isPublished or status field on courses/lessons/exercises collections?
Does the enrollment relationship already exist between users and courses?
complexity_reasoning: Scope: 12 (multi-collection across courses, lessons, exercises + enrollment), Risk: 10 (content access control), Novelty: 5 (bug fix, existing patterns), Cross: 8 (backend + frontend), Ambiguity: 4 (clear requirements, unknown implementation), Deps: 5 (existing enrollment system). Total: 44

input_quality.reasoning: Task has clear ## Requirements with core behaviors and ## Acceptance Criteria with 4 checkable items. Spec.md can be promoted from requirements and acceptance criteria.
